scenarios.id: Comparison1 - Equality-[1] Number-typed integer comparison
scenarios.description: [1] Number-typed integer comparison
scenarios.query:
WITH collect([0, 0.0]) AS numbers
UNWIND numbers AS arr
WITH arr[0] AS expected
MATCH (n) WHERE toInteger(n.id) = expected
RETURN n

scenarios.id: Comparison1 - Equality-[2] Number-typed float comparison
scenarios.description: [2] Number-typed float comparison
scenarios.query:
WITH collect([0.5, 0]) AS numbers
UNWIND numbers AS arr
WITH arr[0] AS expected
MATCH (n) WHERE toInteger(n.id) = expected
RETURN n

scenarios.id: Comparison1 - Equality-[3] Any-typed string comparison
scenarios.description: [3] Any-typed string comparison
scenarios.query:
WITH collect(['0', 0]) AS things
UNWIND things AS arr
WITH arr[0] AS expected
MATCH (n) WHERE toInteger(n.id) = expected
RETURN n

scenarios.id: Comparison1 - Equality-[4] Comparing nodes to nodes
scenarios.description: [4] Comparing nodes to nodes
scenarios.query:
MATCH (a)
WITH a
MATCH (b)
WHERE a = b
RETURN count(b)

scenarios.id: Comparison1 - Equality-[5] Comparing relationships to relationships
scenarios.description: [5] Comparing relationships to relationships
scenarios.query:
MATCH ()-[a]->()
WITH a
MATCH ()-[b]->()
WHERE a = b
RETURN count(b)

scenarios.id: Comparison1 - Equality-[14] Direction of traversed relationship is not significant for path equality, simple
scenarios.description: [14] Direction of traversed relationship is not significant for path equality, simple
scenarios.query:
MATCH p1 = (:A)-->()
MATCH p2 = (:A)<--()
RETURN p1 = p2

scenarios.id: Comparison1 - Equality-[17] Failing when comparing to an undefined variable
scenarios.description: [17] Failing when comparing to an undefined variable
scenarios.query:
MATCH (s)
WHERE s.name = undefinedVariable
  AND s.age = 10
RETURN s
